title: Align tool input handling for tx_event_append and tx_state_save
summary: Adjust tx_event_append and tx_state_save input handling so initialization flows with empty logs are supported without weakening validation outside init scenarios.
acceptance_criteria: Initialization paths handle required inputs for tx_event_append and tx_state_save without errors.
Any defaults or improved errors are limited to init-specific scenarios.
Validation remains strict for non-init tool usage.

steps.description: Identify where tool input validation blocks init flows.
Implement init-safe defaults or clearer errors for required inputs.
Add or update tests covering tool input handling in init scenarios.

notes: Keep changes minimal and scoped to initialization handling.
Do not relax validation for normal tool usage.
